feature: Runtime lane-health degrade (degraded lane elided from confidence denominator)
evidence: No playbook scenario file contains laneHealth, degraded-lane, confidence denominator, or matched-nothing semantics. Closest files: SC-001 five-lane-fusion.md covers weights only; OP-001 degraded-daemon.md covers daemon-level degradation (graph metabolism staleness), not lane-level health inside the scorer; SC-004 lane-attribution.md covers attribution shape only. Grep for 'lane.?health|degraded.?lane|confidence.?denom|laneHealth|matched.?nothing' across all playbook .md files returned 0 matches. Changelog: changelog-003-002-runtime-lane-health-degrade.md confirms the feature shipped always-on with degraded-empty lane elision and matched-nothing lane retention.

feature: Embedding-staleness signal (semantic-lane degrade on stale projection)
evidence: No playbook scenario file covers embedding signatures, embedder-pointer comparison, projection stale verdicts, or semantic-lane degradation on stale vectors. Closest files: SC-002 projection.md covers projection shape and privacy leak checks but not staleness detection; NC-002 native-status-transitions.md covers graph metabolism freshness (live/stale/absent) but not embedding-projection staleness. Grep for 'embedding.?stale|embedding.?signal|projection.?stale|stale.?verdict|embedder|embedding.?signature' across all playbook .md files returned 0 matches. Changelog: changelog-003-003-embedding-staleness-signal.md confirms the feature shipped with signature comparison, stale verdict emission, and semantic-lane degrade on stale.
